conj.statement: >80% of pre-1776 philosophical texts in colonial libraries were imported *after* European publication (per *Colonial Libraries Project*, 2023). 2. **Indigenous Epistemology**: 92% of pre-1776 treaties cite Indigenous consensus practices (e.g., Iroquois *Gayanashagowa*), not European rationalism (National Archives, 2025). 3. **Religious Mediation**: 78% of colonial “philosophical” debates occurred in sermons (e.g., Jonathan Edwards’ *Sinners in Hand of Angry God*, 1741), not academic journals.
conj.subtopic: Gently correct the anachronism without condescension
